title: DEKTON Geckogrip Hook Set 4pc White-Heavy-Duty Wall Hook| Strong Adhesive Grip| Holds Upto 10kg| Ideal for Kitchen, Bathroom, Office| Reusable & Residue-Free| Sleek White Finish| Versatile Storage
features: Heavy-Duty Performance: Engineered for durability, the Dekton Geckogrip Hook Set features robust construction that can hold up to 10kg, making it ideal for organizing and storing a variety of items securely. Whether you need to hang kitchen utensils, bathroom accessories, or office supplies, these hooks offer reliable support and strength.

Strong Adhesive Grip: Equipped with an advanced adhesive backing, these hooks provide a secure hold on most smooth surfaces without the need for drilling or screws. The high-performance adhesive ensures a strong grip while remaining gentle on walls, avoiding damage or the need for repairs.

Residue-Free & Reusable: Designed with convenience in mind, the Geckogrip hooks can be easily removed without leaving behind any sticky residue. They are also reusable, allowing you to reposition them as needed without compromising their adhesive strength, making them a versatile choice for dynamic storage needs.

Sleek White Finish: The elegant white finish of the hooks complements any décor style, from modern to classic. The minimalist design enhances the aesthetics of your space, blending seamlessly with walls in your kitchen, bathroom, or office, while keeping your essentials neatly organized.

Versatile Storage Solution: Perfect for a wide range of applications, these hooks are suitable for use in various settings. Use them in the kitchen to hang utensils, in the bathroom for towels and robes, or in the office to keep your workspace tidy by hanging bags, coats, or accessories.
description: The Dekton Geckogrip Hook Set (4pc, White) is the ultimate solution for versatile and reliable wall storage in any space. Designed with a heavy-duty adhesive grip, these wall hooks provide a strong, secure hold, capable of supporting up to 10kg. Whether you’re organizing your kitchen, bathroom, or office, these hooks offer an ideal way to keep your essentials neatly in place. The powerful adhesive ensures a firm attachment to a variety of surfaces, including tiles, glass, and painted walls, without the need for drilling or damaging your walls. The sleek white finish of the hooks adds a modern touch to any décor, seamlessly blending with your existing color schemes while providing a clean and minimalist look. Their reusable design means you can reposition them as needed without leaving any residue or damaging your surfaces, making them a practical choice for those who like to change their layout frequently or who are renting their homes. These hooks are perfect for hanging towels, utensils, coats, office supplies, and more, offering a versatile storage solution that keeps your spaces tidy and clutter-free. Their heavy-duty construction ensures durability and reliability, even with frequent use. With the Dekton Geckogrip Hook Set, you get both functionality and style, combining strong adhesive technology with an elegant design. Ideal for high-traffic areas and everyday use, these hooks are a convenient and efficient way to enhance your storage options without compromising on aesthetics or ease of installation.
